testsuite.name: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [SynchronizedBeforeSuite]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [chains-suite Tekton Chains E2E tests] infrastructure is running verify the chains controller is running
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [chains-suite Tekton Chains E2E tests] infrastructure is running verify the correct secrets have been created
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [chains-suite Tekton Chains E2E tests] infrastructure is running verify the correct roles are created
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [chains-suite Tekton Chains E2E tests] infrastructure is running verify the correct rolebindings are created
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [chains-suite Tekton Chains E2E tests] infrastructure is running verify the correct service account is created
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [chains-suite Tekton Chains E2E tests] test creating and signing an image and task creates signature and attestation
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [chains-suite Tekton Chains E2E tests] test creating and signing an image and task verify image attestation
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [chains-suite Tekton Chains E2E tests] test creating and signing an image and task cosign verify
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [chains-suite Tekton Chains E2E tests] test creating and signing an image and task verify-enterprise-contract task succeeds when policy is met
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [chains-suite Tekton Chains E2E tests] test creating and signing an image and task verify-enterprise-contract task does not pass when tests are not satisfied on non-strict mode
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [chains-suite Tekton Chains E2E tests] test creating and signing an image and task verify-enterprise-contract task fails when tests are not satisfied on strict mode
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [chains-suite Tekton Chains E2E tests] test creating and signing an image and task verify-enterprise-contract task fails when unexpected signature is used
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-happy-path] Creation of the 'Happy path' resources Create an ApplicationSnapshot.
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-happy-path] Creation of the 'Happy path' resources Create Release Strategy
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-happy-path] Creation of the 'Happy path' resources Create ReleaseLink in dev namespace
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-happy-path] Creation of the 'Happy path' resources Create ReleaseLink in managed namespace
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-happy-path] Creation of the 'Happy path' resources Create a Release
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-happy-path] Post-release verification A PipelineRun should have been created in the managed namespace
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-happy-path] Post-release verification The PipelineRun should exist and succeed
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-happy-path] Post-release verification The Release should have succeeded
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-happy-path] Post-release verification The Release should reference the release PipelineRun
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [has-suite devfile source] Create Red Hat AppStudio Application
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [has-suite devfile source] Check Red Hat AppStudio Application health
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [has-suite devfile source] Check if 'git-clone' cluster tasks exists
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [has-suite devfile source] Create Red Hat AppStudio ComponentDetectionQuery for Component repository
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [has-suite devfile source] Check Red Hat AppStudio ComponentDetectionQuery status
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [has-suite devfile source] Create Red Hat AppStudio Quarkus component
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [has-suite devfile source] Check a Component gets deleted when its application is deleted
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing matching ReleaseLink All required resources are created successfully Create an ApplicationSnapshot
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing matching ReleaseLink All required resources are created successfully Create ReleaseLink in dev namespace
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing matching ReleaseLink All required resources are created successfully Create a Release in dev namespace
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing matching ReleaseLink A ReleaseLink has to have a matching one in a managed workspace The Release has failed with the REASON field set to ReleaseValidationError
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing matching ReleaseLink A ReleaseLink has to have a matching one in a managed workspace Condition message describes an error finding a matching ReleaseLink
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing release pipeline All required resources are created successfully Create an ApplicationSnapshot
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing release pipeline All required resources are created successfully Create ReleaseLink in dev namespace
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing release pipeline All required resources are created successfully Create ReleaseLink in managed namespace
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing release pipeline All required resources are created successfully Create ReleaseStrategy in managed namespace
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing release pipeline All required resources are created successfully Create a Release in dev namespace
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing release pipeline A Release must relate to an existing pipeline in the managed workspace The Release has failed with the REASON field set to ReleasePipelineFailed
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing release pipeline A Release must relate to an existing pipeline in the managed workspace Condition message describes an error retrieving pipeline
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing ReleaseStrategy All required resources are created successfully Create an ApplicationSnapshot
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing ReleaseStrategy All required resources are created successfully Create ReleaseLink in dev namespace
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing ReleaseStrategy All required resources are created successfully Create ReleaseLink in managed namespace
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing ReleaseStrategy All required resources are created successfully Create a Release in dev namespace
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing ReleaseStrategy A Release must relate to an existing ReleaseStrategy in the managed workspace The Release has failed with the REASON field set to ReleaseValidationError
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [release-suite test-release-service-failures] Failure - Missing ReleaseStrategy A Release must relate to an existing ReleaseStrategy in the managed workspace Condition message describes an error retrieving ReleaseStrategy
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [integration-service-suite Integration Service E2E tests] when component with container image source is created should not trigger a PipelineRun
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [integration-service-suite Integration Service E2E tests] when component with git source is created when the PipelineRun has started should eventually finish successfully [slow, integration-service]

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when component with container image source is created should not trigger a PipelineRun
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when component with git source is created triggers a PipelineRun [slow, build-templates-e2e]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when component with git source is created should reference the custom pipeline bundle in a PipelineRun [slow, build-templates-e2e]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

skipped.message: skipped - skipping the specs - custom pipeline bundle is not defined

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when component with git source is created should reference the default pipeline bundle in a PipelineRun [slow]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when component with git source is created when the PipelineRun has started should eventually finish successfully [slow, build-templates-e2e]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when component with git source is created when the PipelineRun is finished eventually leads to a creation of a component webhook (event listener) [slow, webhook]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when component with git source is created when the container image is created and pushed to container registry contains non-empty sbom files [slow, build-templates-e2e, sbom]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when component with git source is created when the component event listener is created should be eventually ready to receive events from Github [slow, webhook]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when component with git source is created when the component webhook is configured on Github repository for 'push' events and a change is pushed eventually leads to triggering another PipelineRun [slow, webhook]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when component with git source is created when the component webhook is configured on Github repository for 'push' events and a change is pushed PipelineRun should eventually finish [slow, webhook]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when component with git source is created when the component webhook is configured on Github repository for 'push' events and a change is pushed ContainerImage field should be updated with the SHA of the commit that was pushed to the Component source repo [slow, webhook]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when a configmap with 'dummy' custom pipeline bundle is created in the testing namespace should be referenced in another PipelineRun
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when a secret with dummy quay.io credentials is created in the testing namespace should override the shared secret [build-secret, slow]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

skipped.message: skipped - a registry auth secret is already created in testing namespace - skipping....

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when a secret with dummy quay.io credentials is created in the testing namespace should not be possible to push to quay.io repo (PipelineRun should fail) [build-secret, slow]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

skipped.message: skipped - Spec skipped because Skip() was called in BeforeAll

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when creating a component with a specific container image URL should fail for ContainerImage field set to a protected repository (without an image tag) [image repository protection]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when creating a component with a specific container image URL should fail for ContainerImage field set to a protected repository followed by a random tag [image repository protection]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when creating a component with a specific container image URL should succeed for ContainerImage field set to a protected repository followed by a namespace prefix + dash + string [image repository protection]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [build-service-suite Build Service E2E tests] when creating a component with a specific container image URL should succeed for ContainerImage field set to a custom (unprotected) repository without a tag being specified [image repository protection]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [cluster-registration-suite Cluster Registration E2E tests] infrastructure is running verify the cluster-registration-installer-controller-manager is running
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [cluster-registration-suite Cluster Registration E2E tests] infrastructure is running verify the correct roles are created
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [cluster-registration-suite Cluster Registration E2E tests] infrastructure is running verify the correct rolebindings are created
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [It] [cluster-registration-suite Cluster Registration E2E tests] infrastructure is running verify the correct service account is created
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests

testcase.name: [SynchronizedAfterSuite]
testcase.classname: Red Hat App Studio E2E tests
